name: category-cloud-01-fixtures
title: Category Cloud 01 — fixtures
author: ilinxa
description: Category Cloud 01 bundle including the dummy-data fixtures (Turkish + English category samples with counts).

files.content:
import type { CategoryCloudItem } from "./types";

export const DUMMY_CATEGORIES_TR: CategoryCloudItem[] = [
  { value: "urban-development", label: "Kentsel Dönüşüm", count: 2 },
  { value: "sustainability", label: "Sürdürülebilirlik", count: 2 },
  { value: "technology", label: "Teknoloji", count: 2 },
  { value: "events", label: "Etkinlik", count: 2 },
  { value: "announcement", label: "Duyuru", count: 2 },
  { value: "research", label: "Araştırma", count: 2 },
];

export const DUMMY_CATEGORIES_EN: CategoryCloudItem[] = [
  { value: "urban-development", label: "Urban Development", count: 12 },
  { value: "sustainability", label: "Sustainability", count: 8 },
  { value: "technology", label: "Technology", count: 5 },
  { value: "events", label: "Events", count: 3 },
  { value: "announcement", label: "Announcement", count: 4 },
  { value: "research", label: "Research", count: 7 },
];
